Localization.Description: The file was created using a GTFOBins utility. GTFOBins is a Unix binaries that can be used to bypass local security restrictions in misconfigured systems.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} created a file using GTFOBins utility {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} created a file using GTFOBins utility {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
